grant_title: HRSA Grant for Telehealth Services in Taliaferro County and Augusta University Service Area
geographic_restrictions: Taliaferro County and other counties served by Augusta University in Georgia
project_area: Telehealth services, including mental health and primary care access for rural students
demographic_requirements: Focus on rural, underserved communities with majority Black or Latino student populations
eligibility_summary: Open to educational institutions, healthcare providers, non-profits, and local government agencies in designated rural Georgia counties to provide telehealth services, including mental health and primary care, via HRSA funding. Must demonstrate ability to deliver services within grant timeline and comply with HRSA reporting requirements.
